articles.author: Kirsten Korosec
articles.title: SpaceX’s Starlink nabs American Airlines contract, another win for its IPO - TechCrunch
articles.description: American Airlines said Tuesday it plans to install Starlink on more than 500 Airbus aircraft, the latest carrier win for IPO-bound SpaceX.
articles.content: American Airlines said Tuesday it plans to install Starlink on more than 500 narrow-body Airbus aircraft beginning early next year, the latest carrier to pick the SpaceX unit for inflight Wi-Fi servi… [+1148 chars]
